title: Non-Fungible Token Standard
summary: ERC-721 defines a standard interface for non-fungible tokens, including ownership, approvals, operators, safe transfers, and transfer/approval events.

security_properties.name: Ownership authorization
security_properties.description: Only the owner, approved address, or authorized operator can transfer a token.

security_properties.name: Safe receiver compatibility
security_properties.description: Safe transfers to contracts must validate receiver compatibility.

security_properties.name: Approval consistency
security_properties.description: Approvals must not allow unauthorized transfers.
